{{Cancer}}

Cancer is the 8th month of the [[Gaian calendar]]. It contains 28 days (4 weeks) and corresponds to ISO weeks 29–32.

== Overview ==
===Etymology===
English ''Cancer'' "crab" (Latin). Japanese: {{ill|蟹座|ja|Kani-za}} “crab-constellation.”  
===Gaiad themes===
Weeks 29–32 (Days [[Cancer 1]]–[[Cancer 28]]):   
===EVENTS===
* [[Cancer 28]] — Qixi

==REFERENCES==
[[Category:Gaian calendar months]]

== Gregorian date ranges (±10 years) ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gaian Year !! Start Date !! End Date !! Gregorian Years
|-
| 12016 || 2016-07-18 || 2016-08-14 || 2016
|-
| 12017 || 2017-07-17 || 2017-08-13 || 2017
|-
| 12018 || 2018-07-16 || 2018-08-12 || 2018
|-
| 12019 || 2019-07-15 || 2019-08-11 || 2019
|-
| 12020 || 2020-07-13 || 2020-08-09 || 2020
|-
| 12021 || 2021-07-19 || 2021-08-15 || 2021
|-
| 12022 || 2022-07-18 || 2022-08-14 || 2022
|-
| 12023 || 2023-07-17 || 2023-08-13 || 2023
|-
| 12024 || 2024-07-15 || 2024-08-11 || 2024
|-
| 12025 || 2025-07-14 || 2025-08-10 || 2025
|-
| 12026 || 2026-07-13 || 2026-08-09 || 2026
|-
| 12027 || 2027-07-19 || 2027-08-15 || 2027
|-
| 12028 || 2028-07-17 || 2028-08-13 || 2028
|-
| 12029 || 2029-07-16 || 2029-08-12 || 2029
|-
| 12030 || 2030-07-15 || 2030-08-11 || 2030
|-
| 12031 || 2031-07-14 || 2031-08-10 || 2031
|-
| 12032 || 2032-07-12 || 2032-08-08 || 2032
|-
| 12033 || 2033-07-18 || 2033-08-14 || 2033
|-
| 12034 || 2034-07-17 || 2034-08-13 || 2034
|-
| 12035 || 2035-07-16 || 2035-08-12 || 2035
|-
| 12036 || 2036-07-14 || 2036-08-10 || 2036
|}

== Days in Cancer ==
{| class="wikitable"
! Day !! Link
|-
| 1 || [[Cancer 1]]
|-
| 2 || [[Cancer 2]]
|-
| 3 || [[Cancer 3]]
|-
| 4 || [[Cancer 4]]
|-
| 5 || [[Cancer 5]]
|-
| 6 || [[Cancer 6]]
|-
| 7 || [[Cancer 7]]
|-
| 8 || [[Cancer 8]]
|-
| 9 || [[Cancer 9]]
|-
| 10 || [[Cancer 10]]
|-
| 11 || [[Cancer 11]]
|-
| 12 || [[Cancer 12]]
|-
| 13 || [[Cancer 13]]
|-
| 14 || [[Cancer 14]]
|-
| 15 || [[Cancer 15]]
|-
| 16 || [[Cancer 16]]
|-
| 17 || [[Cancer 17]]
|-
| 18 || [[Cancer 18]]
|-
| 19 || [[Cancer 19]]
|-
| 20 || [[Cancer 20]]
|-
| 21 || [[Cancer 21]]
|-
| 22 || [[Cancer 22]]
|-
| 23 || [[Cancer 23]]
|-
| 24 || [[Cancer 24]]
|-
| 25 || [[Cancer 25]]
|-
| 26 || [[Cancer 26]]
|-
| 27 || [[Cancer 27]]
|-
| 28 || [[Cancer 28]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Gemini]] (previous month)
* [[Leo]] (next month)
* [[Gaian calendar]]

[[Category:Gaian calendar months|08]]

{{Gaian calendar}}
